title: Choice belongs to the obligor
doc_html:
Art. 1809.  Choice belongs to the obligor

When an obligation is alternative, the choice of the item of performance belongs to the obligor unless it has been expressly or impliedly granted to the obligee.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
